---
title: "Chart of the month"
format: html
---

Each month, we nominate and vote for a chart of month, based on

- Impact
- Novelty
- Clarity
- Aesthetics
- Impact
- General love


Here's a few examples of charts that we have loved in the past:

:::: {.carousel .dark .framed indicators="true" controls="true"}

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/chart1.png" height="400px" caption="ONS Surveys"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/chart2.png" caption="Long Term International Migration"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/chart3.png" caption="UK trade"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/chart4.png" cation="Ownership of UK quoted shares"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/chart5.png" caption="Deaths related to drug poisoning in England and Wales"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/chart6.png" caption="Marriages and Divorces in England and Wales"}
:::

:::: {.carousel-item image="images/COTM/chart7.png" caption="GDP monthly estimate, UK"}
:::


:::
